narrative:
Columbia C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 426 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 35.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.4 percentage points.
